suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note: When renaming Go files, workers should also grep for and update any internal comments or documentation that reference the old filename. The rename-yj-metadata feature left a stale comment on line 15 of yj_metadata.go referencing 'yj_metadata_getters.go'.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature rename-yj-metadata renamed the file but left the internal comment '// Go file: internal/kfx/yj_metadata_getters.go' on line 15 of the new file.

rejectedObservations.observation: Python yj_container.py contains additional constants not yet ported to Go (SINGLETON_FRAGMENT_TYPES, PREFERED_FRAGMENT_TYPE_ORDER, RAW_FRAGMENT_TYPES, DRMION_SIGNATURE, CONTAINER_FORMAT_*).
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing parity gap, not introduced by this milestone's refactoring. The feature scope was explicitly about extracting existing Go symbols, not adding missing Python symbols. Already documented in AGENTS.md parity rules.

rejectedObservations.observation: Go FragmentList uses linear scan while Python uses indexed lookups.
rejectedObservations.reason: Pre-existing design difference, not introduced by this milestone's refactoring. Performance optimization is outside scope of structural reorganization.

rejectedObservations.observation: Documentation files (docs/audit_yj_metadata.md, PARITY_AUDIT.md, .factory/library/) still reference old filename 'yj_metadata_getters.go'.
rejectedObservations.reason: Stale references in documentation files are outside the scope of this structural refactoring milestone. Can be cleaned up opportunistically in future work.
